_about: Curated keepers — the gems worth remembering. Hand-edit name/url/lens/note; `url` is the groups string. `link` is the canonical live URL, tool-stamped from `url` — don't hand-edit it; run `node links.mjs --stamp` after changing rosters. `lens` records which explore.mjs lens surfaced it (or 'reference'). Render with `node montage.mjs`. The on-ramp to gallery.html / presets[].

keepers.name: Red & Black
keepers.note: the classic interlocking knight tessellation with the solid red box — the default

keepers.name: Knights x3
keepers.note: three-color turbulent diagonal bands

keepers.name: Big Sky
keepers.note: huge solid field, one jagged shard, only a handful of island defects

keepers.name: Lightning Crack
keepers.note: solid field split by a single red crack + a tiny defect cluster — minimal/dramatic

keepers.name: Diagonal Bugs
keepers.note: solid field studded with small clustered diagonal islands — kin to the original three-bugs find

keepers.name: Circuit Bar
keepers.note: a domain crossed by a diagonal circuit-board bar

keepers.name: Pinwheel
keepers.note: 8-pointed pinwheel/sunburst, near-perfect symmetry

keepers.name: Quadrant Cross
keepers.note: teal field, red quadrant, a clean central cross axis

keepers.name: Compass
keepers.note: a big diagonal X starburst of textured defects from the center

keepers.name: Bowtie
keepers.note: four-fold pattern with a fuzzy diagonal cross

keepers.name: Torn Paper
keepers.note: muted quadrants with a noisy torn center

keepers.name: Flower Burst
keepers.note: purple/teal/green wedges around a chaotic flower core, 7 colors

keepers.name: Spider
keepers.note: yellow/gray field with a purple spider-burst, 6 colors

keepers.name: Confetti
keepers.note: full 8-color confetti pinwheel

keepers.name: Kaleidoscope
keepers.note: 8-color radial with a strong central cross

keepers.name: Wallpaper
keepers.note: pastel pinwheel quadrants, clean wedges

keepers.name: Conduit
keepers.note: purple/teal/red with a black diagonal circuit bar, 5 colors

keepers.name: Sunburst
keepers.note: red/teal 8-fold sunburst with a textured core

keepers.name: Seam
keepers.note: teal/red fractured field bisected by a vertical column of dotted defects, with red flame-shards thrown into the corners

keepers.name: Pyramids
keepers.note: fine colorbound 'static' sky with two bold magenta pyramids rising from the base — the pyramids/sawtooth family

keepers.name: Turbine
keepers.note: 8-color pinwheel of hatched wedges radiating from the hub (graded knight/wazir/ferz)

keepers.name: Catherine Wheel
keepers.note: firework-style pinwheel, textured wedges spinning out from center

keepers.name: Supernova
keepers.note: balanced 6-color pinwheel with a dense speckled blast at the hub

keepers.name: Black Star
keepers.note: central black starburst — a dense defect asterisk exploding across colored wedges

keepers.name: Motherboard
keepers.note: concentric PCB-style maze, circuit traces radiating in 8 colors

keepers.name: Vortex
keepers.note: 8-color swirling vortex of graded counts
